creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
I'm wondering if this is expected or not? It's cosmetic, and harmless:

hostname="freebsd"
ifconfig_DEFAULT="DHCP inet6 accept_rtadv"
growfs_enable="YES"
hostname="freebsd"
ifconfig_DEFAULT="DHCP inet6 accept_rtadv"
growfs_enable="YES"
hostname="freebsd"
ifconfig_DEFAULT="DHCP inet6 accept_rtadv"
growfs_enable="YES"

It's not present in mini-memstick:

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/ISO-IMAGES/13.1/FreeBSD-13.1-BETA2-arm64-aarch64-mini-memstick.img.xz
